_publications._publicationTitle: [18F]fluorothymidine and [18F]fluorodeoxyglucose PET Imaging Demonstrates Uptake and Differentiates Growth in Neurofibromatosis 2 Related Vestibular Schwannoma.

_contextSnippet: HRRT: adjusted R² value of 0.85 vs 0.86 with RM
details: Achieved higher correlation between FDG and FLT SUV mean values with adjusted R² values of 0.85 without RM and 0.86 with RM
